params.TriggerDescription: Whenever another creature you control enters or dies, if that creature's power is greater than CARDNAME's, put a +1/+1 counter on CARDNAME.
Whenever another creature you control enters or dies, if that creature's power is greater than CARDNAME's, put a +1/+1 counter on CARDNAME.

params.Description: As long as CARDNAME has three or more +1/+1 counters on it, it has trample.
